description: A reader should receive governance view objects via VIEW_ANNOUNCE during first-time sync when the seed advertises view-sync capability.

assertions.description: Reader successfully completed sync and received governance view objects from a view-capable seed.
Reader's post-sync store contains the governance view object published by the seed.

notes: Proves governance view distribution end-to-end: seed populates view, advertises view-sync, reader receives view via VIEW_ANNOUNCE.
Governance views are stored as protocol objects and treated as governance signals, not local policy state.
